name: Garlic Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak beans overnight and drain.
2. Cover beans with stock in a stockpot and bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to maintain a simmer.
4. Roast garlic and red pepper in the oven for approximately one hour until soft.
5. Peel off the blackened skin of the red pepper and discard. Dice and add to beans and broth.
6. Squeeze roasted garlic out of cloves into the broth.
7. Cook for approximately 2 hours, or until beans are tender.
8. Puree half of the mixture and return it to the pot.
